title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Madras International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Madras International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras International Enterprises:
IIT Madras International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
